context: √  6 x 5.5 x 25 mm metallic device √  11 x 26 mm metallic device (d)  accidental / nonaccidental ingestion ›  0.44 mm thick polypropylene √  line of attenuation similar to muscle ›  1-mm thick polytetrafluoroethylene √  line of increased attenuation √  usually absorbed within 7-14 days √  mimick abscess due to numerous gas pockets Packing agents mimic an abscess when imaged prior to absorption by 7-14 days post surgery. ›  collagen: attenuation similar to soft tissue ›  carbon-coated microbeads: 1500-2000 HU At risk:   emergency surgery, unplanned change of procedure, obesity A radiopaque mark
